message:
Adapt tenzir-test invocations to use environment variables

Switch from CLI arguments (--tenzir-binary and --tenzir-node-binary)
to environment variables (TENZIR_BINARY and TENZIR_NODE_BINARY) for
specifying the paths to tenzir and tenzir-node binaries. This follows
the recent changes to tenzir-test that removed support for these CLI
arguments in favor of environment variable configuration.

Updates:
- Dockerfile: Pass paths via environment variables
- nix/tenzir/check.nix: Pass paths via environment variables
- tenzir/CMakeLists.txt: Pass paths via environment variables

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -409,11 +409,12 @@ USER tenzir:tenzir
 FROM tenzir-ce-untested AS tenzir-ce-integration
 
 COPY test/ ./test
-RUN XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp "${PREFIX}/libexec/uv" tool run \
+RUN XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp \
+    TENZIR_BINARY="$PREFIX/bin/tenzir" \
+    TENZIR_NODE_BINARY="$PREFIX/bin/tenzir-node" \
+    "${PREFIX}/libexec/uv" tool run \
     --python ">=3.12" \
     tenzir-test \
-    --tenzir-binary "$PREFIX/bin/tenzir" \
-    --tenzir-node-binary "$PREFIX/bin/tenzir-node" \
     --root test \
     -j $(nproc) && \
     echo "success" > /tmp/tenzir-integration-result

@@ -30,8 +30,6 @@ stdenvNoCC.mkDerivation {
         if [ -d "${path}/test/tests" ]; then
           echo "running ${path} integration tests"
           tenzir-test \
-            --tenzir-binary ${lib.getBin unchecked}/bin/tenzir \
-            --tenzir-node-binary ${lib.getBin unchecked}/bin/tenzir-node \
             --root "${src}/test" \
             -j $NIX_BUILD_CORES \
             ${path}/test
@@ -43,6 +41,8 @@ stdenvNoCC.mkDerivation {
       export UV_NO_INDEX=1
       export UV_OFFLINE=1
       export UV_PYTHON=${lib.getExe py3}
+      export TENZIR_BINARY=${lib.getBin unchecked}/bin/tenzir
+      export TENZIR_NODE_BINARY=${lib.getBin unchecked}/bin/tenzir-node
       export TENZIR_ALLOC_STATS=1
       ${lib.optionalString (stdenvNoCC.buildPlatform.isx86_64) "export TENZIR_ALLOC_ACTOR_STATS=1"}
       mkdir -p cache data state tmp

@@ -213,17 +213,15 @@ function (tenzir_build_test_command out_var)
   list(
     APPEND
     cmd
+    "TENZIR_BINARY=$<TARGET_FILE:tenzir::tenzir>"
+    "TENZIR_NODE_BINARY=$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:tenzir::tenzir>/tenzir-node"
     "--"
     "${TENZIR_UV_PATH}"
     "tool"
     "run"
     "--python"
     ">=3.12"
-    "tenzir-test"
-    "--tenzir-binary"
-    "$<TARGET_FILE:tenzir::tenzir>"
-    "--tenzir-node-binary"
-    "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:tenzir::tenzir>/tenzir-node")
+    "tenzir-test")
 
   # Add extra arguments if provided
   if (ARG_EXTRA_ARGS)
